# 🖼️ Repository Branding Checklist

This file tracks what to configure on GitHub.com (cannot be done via CLI/API).
Visit **https://github.com/ltmoerdani/stemmagraph/settings** and check off:

## About sidebar (top-right of repo page)

- [x] **Description** — set via CLI to "🌳 Open-source interactive family tree platform…"
- [x] **Homepage URL** — set to <https://ltmoerdani.github.io/stemmagraph/>
- [x] **Topics** — added 14 SEO topics (family-tree, genealogy, ancestry, react, etc.)
- [x] **Releases** — enable (Settings → Features → Releases)

## Social preview

- [ ] **Upload social preview image** (Settings → Social preview)
  - File: `og-image.png`, must be **1200×630**, PNG/JPG, under 1 MB
  - **Generator:** open `.github/social-preview.html` in a browser, screenshot at 1200×630
  - Also save a copy to `public/og-image.png` so the live demo's `og:image` meta tag works
  - **Why:** without this, link previews on Twitter/LinkedIn/WA look generic and reduce click-through

## Discussions

- [x] Enabled via CLI
- [x] **Announcements** category created — welcome post Discussion #3 pinned
- [ ] (Optional) Configure **Discussion Category Forms** for structured Q&A

## Issues

- [x] Issue templates (`bug_report.yml`, `feature_request.yml`) deployed
- [x] 18 labels created (including `hacktoberfest`, `good first issue`, area labels)

## GitHub Pages

- [x] Source: GitHub Actions
- [x] Custom 404 SPA fallback (auto-generated by `deploy.yml`)
- [x] Live: <https://ltmoerdani.github.io/stemmagraph/>

## Releases

- [ ] **Publish v0.1.0 release** (Settings → Releases → Draft new release)
  - Tag: `v0.1.0` on `main`
  - Title: "Stemmagraph v0.1.0 — first public release 🌳"
  - Body: highlight features + live demo + how to contribute
  - **Why:** Releases appear on GitHub Explore and the user's profile activity feed

## Profile discoverability

- [ ] **Pin repo** to profile (github.com/ltmoerdani → Customize pins → add stemmagraph)
- [ ] **Tweet / post** with screenshot + live demo URL — the og:image will be auto-fetched once uploaded

## Branch protection (recommended)

- [ ] Settings → Branches → Add rule for `main`:
  - Require PR before merging
  - Require status checks: `Lint + Type-check + Build` (from `ci.yml`)
  - Require approvals: 1 (optional but good for open source)
